name: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)
description: Snapping at the heels of last year’s Eastern Flowers and Wabi Sabi lps, prolific polymath Sven Wunder returns this June with his third full-lengh, Natura Morta. In anticipation, Wunder recorded the following vinyl mix for AD, via his home studio in Sweden, leaning into aesthetic influences and inspiration.

tracks.track: Pop Avenue: Stunning library record with fantastic pop impressions.
tracks.raw: Janko Nilovic – Pop Avenue: Stunning library record with fantastic pop impressions.

tracks.track: Incantesimo: Music by Maestro Nicolai, from Love Birds, that simply will put a magic spell on you.
tracks.raw: Bruno Nicolai – Incantesimo: Music by Maestro Nicolai, from Love Birds, that simply will put a magic spell on you.

tracks.track: Walking In The Dark: Incredible music from the album Feelings that needs no further introduction.
tracks.raw: Jay Richford & Gary Stevan – Walking In The Dark: Incredible music from the album Feelings that needs no further introduction.

tracks.track: Pianure D’Asia: Hypnotic storytelling with the flute with flavours from ancient worlds by Maestro Umiliani.
tracks.raw: Piero Umiliani – Pianure D’Asia: Hypnotic storytelling with the flute with flavours from ancient worlds by Maestro Umiliani.

tracks.track: Accadde A Bali: Another beautiful library track with flute and stunning artwork.
tracks.raw: Arawak – Accadde A Bali: Another beautiful library track with flute and stunning artwork.

tracks.track: Fiore Nero: Avant-garde blues with lovely drums and a laid back feeling.
tracks.raw: Piero Piccioni – Fiore Nero: Avant-garde blues with lovely drums and a laid back feeling.

tracks.track: Eat It: Another Morricone banger from the Eat It soundtrack.
tracks.raw: Ennio Morricone – Eat It: Another Morricone banger from the Eat It soundtrack.

tracks.track: Teorema: Lovely moment with the guitar, like a fuga by Bach. Stunning artwork as well.
tracks.raw: Bruno Nicolai – Teorema: Lovely moment with the guitar, like a fuga by Bach. Stunning artwork as well.

tracks.track: Philarmonia: Unique melody by Rino De Filippi that sounds like nothing else and with stunning second part featuring English horn.
tracks.raw: Rino De Filippi – Philarmonia: Unique melody by Rino De Filippi that sounds like nothing else and with stunning second part featuring English horn.

tracks.track: Tattile: ”Tattile” is pure bliss. Oscar Rocchi and Giancarlo Barigozzi has been a huge inspiration working on my Natura Morta album.
tracks.raw: Oscar Rocchi – Tattile: ”Tattile” is pure bliss. Oscar Rocchi and Giancarlo Barigozzi has been a huge inspiration working on my Natura Morta album.

tracks.track: Sixth Dimension: Pulsating track with a strong groove and interesting layers.
tracks.raw: Stefano Torossi / Giovanni Tommaso – Sixth Dimension: Pulsating track with a strong groove and interesting layers.

tracks.track: Prairies:  Exciting wildlife track with psychedelic rhythms and adventurous arrangements.
tracks.raw: Giuliano Sorgini – Prairies:  Exciting wildlife track with psychedelic rhythms and adventurous arrangements.

tracks.track: Clessidra : Another incredible Sorgini track (and album too) with stunning artwork.
tracks.raw: Giuliano Sorgini – Clessidra : Another incredible Sorgini track (and album too) with stunning artwork.

tracks.track: Dance Music: This fantastic track from Mukti is a Bollywood beauty that needs no further introduction.
tracks.raw: Rahul Dev Burman – Dance Music: This fantastic track from Mukti is a Bollywood beauty that needs no further introduction.

tracks.track: Pageing Sullivan: Strong rhythmic jazz waltz by Basil Kirchin & company.
tracks.raw: The London Studio Group – Pageing Sullivan: Strong rhythmic jazz waltz by Basil Kirchin & company.

tracks.track: Metropoli: Another beautiful jazzwaltz in 6/8 credited to Nuan alias Antonello Vannucchi.
tracks.raw: Nuan – Metropoli: Another beautiful jazzwaltz in 6/8 credited to Nuan alias Antonello Vannucchi.

tracks.track: Valle Celeste: Stunning ballad with haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.
tracks.raw: Bruno Battisti D’Amario – Valle Celeste: Stunning ballad with haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.

tracks.track: To Jean: Beautiful lounge pop with fantastic arrangements by Pisano and haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.
tracks.raw: Berto Pisano – To Jean: Beautiful lounge pop with fantastic arrangements by Pisano and haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.

tracks.track: Foggy Town: Beautiful dreamy guitar-led track by Alessandroni. His work has been a strong influence working on Natura Morta as well.
tracks.raw: Alessandro Alessandroni – Foggy Town: Beautiful dreamy guitar-led track by Alessandroni. His work has been a strong influence working on Natura Morta as well.
